title: SWS GUI
description: This pack features a completely redesigned interface with MINECRAFT LANDSCAPE panorama overlay integrated into the UI.
body:
Give your Minecraft experience a unique touch with this Custom GUI Resource Pack! This pack features a completely redesigned interface with MINECRAFT LANDSCAPE panorama overlay integrated into the UI. Whether you're looking for a fresh new look or just want to add some personal flair to your game, this pack is perfect for you.

🔹 How to Install:

Download the .zip file.

Place it in the resourcepacks folder (.minecraft/resourcepacks).

Select the pack in Minecraft's resource pack settings.

Enjoy your custom GUI!

 

 

💡 Compatible with both Vanilla and modded Minecraft!

🔗 If you enjoy this pack, don’t forget to leave a review! 😊
